resources.string: Habit contribution grid — track your streaks at a glance
Today\'s habit checklist — check off habits right from your home screen
Daily summary ring — see your overall habit completion at a glance
Weekly bar chart — visualize your habit completion over the past 7 days
Radial progress rings — concentric arcs for each of your top habits
Mini heatmap + stats — 8-week grid with streak and completion stats
Streak tracker — see your top active streaks and all-time best
Daily motivation — a fresh quote every day to keep you going
Quick toggle — tap once to mark a binary habit complete
Session timer — start and stop a timer to log duration habits
Habit streak — current streak and 30-day progress for one habit
Multi-habit — quick-action buttons for 3–5 selected habits
